entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`accountId` TEXT NOT NULL, `firstName` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastName` TEXT NOT NULL, `dob` TEXT NOT NULL, `email` TEXT NOT NULL, `expiresAt` TEXT, `fcmToken` TEXT, `gender` TEXT NOT NULL, `isActiveAccount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isLoggedIn` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isExpired` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isSynced` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastActiveTime` TEXT, `zipcode` TEXT NOT NULL, `hasSeenAppReview` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hasSeenScaleReview` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `accountSettings` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`accountId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`babyId` TEXT NOT NULL, `accountId` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `birthdate` TEXT, `sex` TEXT, `birthWeightDecigrams` INTEGER, `birthLengthMillimeters` INTEGER, `isBorn` INTEGER, `isOwnedByAccount` INTEGER, `permissions` INTEGER, `createdAt` INTEGER, `dueDate` TEXT, `lastUpdated` TEXT, `isSynced` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDeleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `activeBabyId` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`babyId`), FOREIGN KEY(`accountId`) REFERENCES `account`(`accountId`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `babyId` TEXT NOT NULL, `babyWeightDecigrams` INTEGER, `babyLengthMillimeters` INTEGER, `entryNote` TEXT, `entryType` TEXT, `feedingTimeLeft` INTEGER, `feedingTimeRight` INTEGER, `feedingMilliliters` INTEGER, `diaperType` TEXT, `sleepTime` INTEGER, `babyDisplayWeightDecigrams` INTEGER, `photoUri` TEXT, `isPlaceholder` INTEGER, `source` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`id`) REFERENCES `entry`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`babyId`) REFERENCES `baby`(`babyId`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

views.createSql:
CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT * FROM entry e
        WHERE e.operationType != 'delete'
          AND e.pendingDelete = 0
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM entry d
            WHERE d.accountId = e.accountId
              AND d.entryTimestamp = e.entryTimestamp
              AND d.operationType = 'delete'
          )
